response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: Partially matched. The reference JSON only provided lyrics for the first song ('Planetarium') up to 03:20.000, and omitted the second song ('RELAY').
2. JSON Usage: Fully used the first part of the reference JSON for 'Planetarium' and transitioned to 100% manual transcription/translation for 'RELAY'.
3. Timing & Pacing: Strictly anchored to the exact millisecond of vocal onsets. Used visual event rules to display the title card for 'RELAY' during the transition scene. No CC tags used.

subtitles.original: 泣かないよ 昔君と見た きれいな空だったから
subtitles.english: I won't cry, because it was a beautiful sky I saw with you long ago

subtitles.original: あの道まで 響く靴の音が耳に残る
subtitles.english: Along that road, the echoing sound of shoes remains in my ears

subtitles.original: 大きな自分の影を見つめて 想うのでしょう
subtitles.english: Staring at my own large shadow, I wonder what I'm thinking

subtitles.original: ちっとも変わらないはずなのに
subtitles.english: Even though it shouldn't have changed at all

subtitles.original: せつない気持ちふくらんでく
subtitles.english: These painful feelings keep swelling up

subtitles.original: どんなに想ったって 君はもういない
subtitles.english: No matter how much I miss you, you're already gone

subtitles.original: 行きたいよ 君のそばに 小さくても小さくても
subtitles.english: I want to go to your side, even if it's small, even if it's small

subtitles.original: 1番に君が好きだよ 強くいられる
subtitles.english: I love you the most, I can be strong

subtitles.original: 願いを流れ星に そっと唱えてみたけれど
subtitles.english: I whispered a wish to a shooting star, but...

subtitles.original: 泣かないよ 届くだろう きれいな空に
subtitles.english: I won't cry, it will reach that beautiful sky

subtitles.original: 会えなくても 記憶をたどって
subtitles.english: Even if we can't meet, I'll trace my memories

subtitles.original: 同じ幸せを見たいんだ
subtitles.english: I want to see the same happiness

subtitles.original: あの香りとともに 花火がぱっと開く
subtitles.english: Along with that scent, fireworks burst open

subtitles.original: 行きたいよ 君のところへ 小さな手をにぎりしめて
subtitles.english: I want to go to you, clutching our small hands

subtitles.original: 泣きたいよ それはそれは きれいな空だった
subtitles.english: I want to cry, it was, oh it was, a beautiful sky

subtitles.original: 願いを流れ星に そっと唱えてみたけれど
subtitles.english: I whispered a wish to a shooting star, but...

subtitles.original: 泣きたいよ 届かない想いをこの空に...
subtitles.english: I want to cry, my unreachable feelings into this sky...

subtitles.original: [曲：RELAY / 作詞：カトウチヒロ / 作曲：Konami Amusement]
subtitles.english: [Song: RELAY / Lyrics: Chihiro Kato / Composition: Konami Amusement]

subtitles.original: もっ何十回 もう何百回も 震えるソラ見上げて
subtitles.english: Dozens of times, hundreds of times, looking up at the trembling sky

subtitles.original: 辿り着いた場所が 運命のダイヤモンド
subtitles.english: The place we arrived at is the diamond of destiny

subtitles.original: 何千回 もう何万回も 涙流したきみへ
subtitles.english: To you who shed tears thousands, tens of thousands of times

subtitles.original: ねえ 諦められたことはあったっけ？
subtitles.english: Tell me, was there ever anything we could just give up on?

subtitles.original: 「憧れ＝限界」だから もういらないよ
subtitles.english: Because "aspiration = limit", I don't need it anymore

subtitles.original: そこにとどまるなんて もったいないでしょ
subtitles.english: Just staying there is such a waste, right?

subtitles.original: それぞれの物語 交差する瞬間を 見つめる意味は
subtitles.english: The meaning of watching the moment our respective stories intersect is...

subtitles.original: 放った夢だけ 大きな弧を描いて
subtitles.english: Only the dreams we let go of draw a big arc

subtitles.original: はちきれそうな煌めきを
subtitles.english: Carrying a sparkle that's about to burst

subtitles.original: 消えることなく どこまででも
subtitles.english: Without fading away, wherever it may go
